description: Declarative source for the ai_studio refactor tree. The architecture map page is only a renderer; serve ai_studio/architecture_map/index.html and validate this JSON with ai_studio/architecture_map/validate_map.mjs.

root.title: ai_studio/
root.subtitle: refactor root
root.description: Clean refactor tree. Start with Core Harness only; promote modules from Not Refactored after review, cleanup, owner assignment, and compatibility checks.

children.title: ai_studio/README.md
children.description: AI Studio root index: describes available capabilities, task routing, migration rules, map ownership, and where to go for each kind of work.
children.role: AI Studio root capability index and router

children.title: Studio Shell
children.subtitle: single UI entry point
children.description: Shared browser shell for AI Studio surfaces: home, persistent navigation, collapse state, theme, and unified local serving. It hosts surfaces but does not own module domain logic.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Studio Shell module contract: owns the shared browser shell, defines surface vs module ownership, and lists hosted surfaces.

children.title: Home Surface
children.description: AI Studio home surface: opens the architecture map, taskboard, tree source, and validation report from one local URL.

children.title: server.mjs
children.description: Unified local server for AI Studio home, Architecture Map surface, Taskboard surface, tree.json, validation report, and Taskboard API routes.

children.title: start_site.mjs
children.description: Stable launcher for the AI Studio local site. Starts the server in the background, writes PID and logs, verifies the page, supports --open, --restart, and --port.

children.title: start_site.cmd
children.description: Small Windows wrapper for launching the AI Studio local server as a detached minimized process.
children.role: Windows AI Studio site launch helper

children.title: Shared UI Implementation
children.subtitle: css/js internals
children.description: Low-level browser files for the shared AI Studio shell. Hidden from the default graph so Studio Shell stays readable as one architectural surface.

children.title: home.css
children.description: AI Studio home-surface content styling. The shared navigation shell is owned by studio_shell.css and studio_shell.js.

children.title: studio_shell.css
children.description: Shared dark AI Studio app shell: persistent left navigation, collapsed navigation state, page content area, and responsive sidebar behavior.

children.title: studio_shell.js
children.description: Shared browser behavior for the AI Studio left sidebar: collapse and expand toggle with localStorage persistence.

children.title: Core Harness
children.subtitle: ai_studio/core_harness
children.description: Harness, agent-facing contract, AGENTS.md, root compatibility surfaces, and the smallest public entry points needed to start work.
Core Harness module contract: what belongs in the always-nearby harness, what is only a compatibility surface, and how Core routes into workflow, orchestration, and validation.
Repo-level harness contract loaded by agents: repository role, AI Studio direction, current-game routing, hard invariants, and context routes.
Compatibility pointer for Claude-facing harnesses; should stay generated or thin and route back to AGENTS.md.
Current-game routing file. Keeps active game context out of AGENTS.md and points to game design docs, task state, and game folder when a game is active.

children.title: Workflow
children.subtitle: task execution order
children.description: Core Harness workflow group: local process for context loading, work loop, validation handoff, and delegation checkpoint.
children.role: agent task workflow inside the harness

children.description: Canonical Workflow contract: context policy, lead-agent work loop, validation handoff, and delegation checkpoint.

children.title: Orchestration
children.subtitle: early subagent split
children.description: Child rule inside Workflow for broad read-heavy work. Keeps subagent use lightweight with Task / Scope / Return / Stop packets; it is not a product, task store, or public CLI.
children.role: workflow delegation trigger and packet shape

children.description: Short orchestration contract: when to split work, the simple packet format, lead responsibility, and boundary with Workflow and Taskboard.

children.title: Agent Surfaces
children.subtitle: generated Codex/Claude surfaces
children.description: Core Harness module for generated agent-facing compatibility surfaces: Claude skill pointers and Codex/Claude hook configs.
children.role: agent surface generation and drift checks

children.title: README.md
children.description: Agent Surfaces contract: canonical sources, generated outputs, command entrypoints, and module boundaries.

children.title: sync.mjs
children.description: Aggregate command that regenerates or checks all generated agent surfaces.

children.title: skills_sync.mjs
children.description: Generates .claude/skills thin pointers from canonical .codex/skills instructions and removes stale generated pointers.

children.title: hooks_sync.mjs
children.description: Generates .codex/hooks.json and the hooks block of .claude/settings.json from one canonical hook source.

children.title: Tests
children.subtitle: sync regressions
children.description: Regression tests for generated skill pointers and hook config rendering.

children.title: skills_sync.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for generated skill pointer creation, stale pointer detection, and hand-written skill preservation.

children.title: hooks_sync.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests that hook generation reproduces committed Codex/Claude config and preserves tool-specific matcher vocabularies.

children.title: Validation
children.subtitle: fast route checks
children.description: Fast Core Harness validation for agent-facing docs, stale file references, and retired command routes. Module test suites stay with their owning modules.
children.role: core harness route and reference guard

children.description: Core validation contract: fast mechanical checks only; no global pipeline validation.
Mechanical guard for stale local references, missing files, and retired commands in agent-facing Markdown.
Regression tests for the stale-reference guard and retired command detection.

children.title: Taskboard
children.subtitle: tasks/ + ai_studio/taskboard
children.description: Durable project work state: tasks, epics, context digest, and task-store validation.
Taskboard contract for task files, statuses, task lifecycle, durable context, and task CLI usage.
Detailed task-store reference for fields, lifecycle, and maintenance rules.

children.title: nt-taskboard-manager
children.description: Thin Codex skill router for Taskboard work. It activates task capture, planning, reporting, and status updates, then routes agents to the Taskboard product/API contract.
Public Taskboard CLI for listing, context digest, task create/update, and task-store validation.
Taskboard implementation library: parsing, validation, context digest, task mutation, and task-state checks used by orchestration.
Taskboard HTTP API adapter for board payloads and task/epic CRUD routes. Studio Shell mounts it but does not own the Taskboard domain contract.
Taskboard browser surface. Served by Studio Shell; Taskboard owns the surface content, not the shared server.

children.title: Surface Implementation
children.subtitle: public static files
children.description: Static browser files behind the Taskboard surface. Hidden from the default graph so the page is represented as one surface unless implementation details are needed.

children.title: index.html
children.description: Taskboard browser document hosted at /taskboard/ by Studio Shell.

children.title: style.css
children.description: Taskboard page-specific styling. Shared navigation styling comes from Studio Shell.

children.title: app.js
children.description: Taskboard browser behavior for loading, editing, and rendering tasks through the shared Taskboard API.

children.title: markdown_preview.js
children.description: Small Markdown preview helper used by the Taskboard browser surface.
Taskboard regression tests for parsing, commands, context, validation, and task lifecycle behavior.

children.title: Assets
children.subtitle: reviewed asset tools
children.description: Reviewed AI Studio asset modules. Starts with Asset Viewer; broader source search, intake, conversion, and gates stay in Not Refactored until separately reviewed.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Assets module contract: what has moved into AI Studio and which legacy asset-pipeline areas still need separate review.

children.title: Asset Viewer
children.subtitle: library and review gallery
children.description: Browser-facing asset gallery for library browsing, game-asset review, pick manifests, 3D model inspection, promotion, and reuse pulls.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Asset Viewer module contract: modes, commands, ownership boundaries, and why the gallery server remains separate.

children.title: build_review.mjs
children.description: Generates static asset gallery outputs for shared-library browsing, game-asset review, or direct asset-folder scans.

children.title: serve_gallery.mjs
children.description: Serves a generated asset gallery and maps a large external asset library at /lib/ so library browsing can avoid copying every media file.

children.title: promote.mjs
children.description: Promotes selected assets from a review manifest into the shared library with catalog metadata, license records, and integrity data.

children.title: pull.mjs
children.description: Copies selected shared-library assets into a game-local asset tree while preserving source_id linkage and restricted-asset routing.

children.title: record_gallery.mjs
children.description: Records a browser session of the asset gallery for review or presentation evidence.

children.title: Surface Implementation
children.subtitle: viewer js/css
children.description: Static browser files copied into generated gallery outputs. Hidden from the default graph so Asset Viewer remains readable as one surface.

children.title: viewer.js
children.description: Vanilla browser SPA for filters, pack views, asset modal, picking, and model-viewer integration.

children.title: viewer.css
children.description: Asset Viewer page styling for gallery cards, filters, sheets, and model previews.

children.title: Tests
children.subtitle: asset viewer regressions
children.description: Regression tests for Asset Viewer generation and promotion behavior.

children.title: build_review.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for asset kind classification, origin detection, escaping, and gallery HTML rendering.

children.title: promote.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for promoting picked assets into the shared library with catalog and license records.

children.title: Architecture Map
children.subtitle: tree renderer and map validation
children.description: Self-map for this AI Studio refactor tree: live HTML renderer, declarative tree data, and validation report for unmapped or stale files.

children.title: tree.json
children.description: Declarative source for the working ai_studio tree: hierarchy, node ids, manual labels, roles, tags, and explicit child order.
children.role: declarative source of the ai_studio tree

children.title: README.md
children.description: Architecture Map module contract: tree.json is architecture truth, index.html only renders, validate_map.mjs only audits.

children.title: Architecture Map Surface
children.description: Browser surface and renderer for tree.json and validation-report.json. It is hosted by Studio Shell but owned by Architecture Map.

children.title: validate_map.mjs
children.description: Scans known AI Studio and legacy pipeline paths and writes validation-report.json with unmapped, missing, duplicate, and underspecified files.
children.role: architecture map scanner and report writer

children.title: validation-report.json
children.description: Generated report displayed by the map page so newly created or unmapped files are visible during refactoring.

children.title: validate_map.test.mjs
children.description: Regression tests for missing, duplicate, unmapped, and mapped-directory validation behavior.

children.title: Not Refactored
children.subtitle: current scattered pipeline
children.description: Everything that exists today but has not yet been reviewed, cleaned, assigned an owner, and moved into the main ai_studio tree.

children.title: Legacy Pipeline Routes
children.subtitle: known old docs/tools
children.description: Known pre-refactor pipeline docs and tools. They are intentionally visible as not-refactored until each one is reviewed, moved to an owning module, or deleted.

children.title: tools/README.md
children.description: Legacy tools route map. Keep visible until tool ownership is split across AI Studio modules.

children.title: quality-validation.md
children.description: Legacy quality and validation reference. Module-owned validation should replace broad pipeline routing over time.

children.title: profiling-reuse.md
children.description: Legacy profiling, reuse, closeout, and export reference awaiting ownership review.

children.title: TEMPLATE.md
children.description: Legacy portable export template contract awaiting export-module ownership review.
